{{Infobox icon
| name = Oracle Icon
| introduced = Reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] was once considered a prime candidate to manifest the [[Oracle Icon]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8">''Reaper'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] has the guidance of the [[Oracle Icon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c16">''Waybound'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Oracle Icon]] can allow one to steal from a sealed [[void]] space.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Oracle Icon]] is shaped like an all-seeing eye.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c28">''Waybound'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
